name: Worksport Ltd
summary: Worksport Ltd. designs, develops, and manufactures innovative products for automotive accessories, consumer electronics, and HVAC markets. Key products include hard-folding and soft tonneau covers for light trucks, the SOLIS solar-integrated tonneau cover, the COR portable battery system, and the Aetherlux Heat Pump developed through subsidiary Terravis Energy. The company protects its offerings through a growing IP portfolio covering tonneau covers, solar integration, portable power, hydrogen energy, heat pumps, and EV charging stations.

products.name: AL4 Tonneau Cover
products.description: Soft folding tonneau cover for light trucks sold through direct and dealer channels.

products.name: HD3 Tonneau Cover
products.description: Heavy-duty hard-folding tonneau cover sold through business-to-business dealer network.

products.name: SOLIS
products.description: Solar-integrated truck-mounted folding tonneau cover and solar array for clean energy generation.

products.name: COR
products.description: Portable battery generator system designed to work alongside the SOLIS solar tonneau cover.

products.name: Aetherlux Heat Pump
products.description: Groundbreaking residential and commercial heat pump with Zerofrost technology developed by subsidiary Terravis Energy.

partnerships.description: Exclusive financial advisor for warrant inducement transactions in February and December 2025.
